results.rendered_html: 1. pṛṣṭa (von sparś) adj. haftend: pṛṣṭo divi pṛṣṭo agniḥ pathivyāṃ pṛṣṭo viśvā oṣadhīrā viveśa  ṚV. 1,98,2 . pṛṣṭo divi dhāyyagniḥ pṛthivyām 7,5,2 . divi pṛṣṭo arocatāgniḥ  VS. 33,92  ( NIR. 7,23 ). dhartā divo rajasaspṛṣṭa ūrdhvaḥ  ṚV. 3,49,4 .
